title: Two arrested in connection with Asla Park rape
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men, aged 27 and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men, aged 27 and 31, are expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 29 September, in connection with the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, last Friday, 26 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two men, aged 27 and 31, are expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 29 September, in connection with the rape of a 25-year-old woman in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, last Friday, 26 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said the woman had allegedly received a lift from a man in the early hours of Friday after a party, and that he took her to his home where he and his friend allegedly raped her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A case of rape was opened at the KwaNonqaba Police Station and was then transferred to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit.","html":"A case of rape was opened at the KwaNonqaba Police Station and was then transferred to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The two suspects were arrested. The outcome of their court appearance was not known by the time of publishing.","html":"The two suspects were arrested. The outcome of their court appearance was not known by the time of publishing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Two arrested in connection with Asla Park rape
